member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
The value of the argument that caused this exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.
member.param: Number to be expected being less than min.
The number that must be less than the argument.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata
member.summary: Application-level metadata model.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata.DeploymentRing
member.summary: Gets or sets the deployment ring from where the application is running.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata.BuildVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the application's build version.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata.ApplicationName
member.summary: Gets or sets the application's name.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata.EnvironmentName
member.summary: Gets or sets the application's environment name, such as Development, Staging, or Production.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadataSource
member.summary: Provides virtual configuration source for service metadata information.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadataSource.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: An instance of .
Section name to be used in configuration.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadataSource.SectionName
member.summary: Gets configuration section name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadataSource.Build(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder)
member.summary: Builds an for the source.
member.param: The to add to.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadataValidator.Validate(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata)
member.summary: Validates a specific named options instance (or all when is ).
member.param: The name of the options instance being validated.
The options instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ApplicationMetadataConfigurationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for application metadata.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.ApplicationMetadataConfigurationBuilderExtensions.AddApplicationMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a configuration provider for application metadata.
member.param: The configuration builder.
An instance of .
The section name to save configuration into. The default is "ambientmetadata:application".

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.OptionsBuilder{``0},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers a configuration instance which will bind against.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.OptionsBuilder{``0},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions})
member.summary: Registers a configuration instance which will bind against.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Configure``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions})
member.summary: Registers a configuration instance which TOptions will bind against.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApplicationMetadataHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for application metadata.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApplicationMetadataHostBuilderExtensions.UseApplicationMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a configuration provider for application metadata and binds a model object onto the configuration.
member.param: The host builder.
Section name to bind configuration from. Default set to "ambientmetadata:application".

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApplicationMetadataHostBuilderExtensions.UseApplicationMetadata``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a configuration provider for application metadata and binds a model object onto the configuration.
member.param: The host builder.
Section name to bind configuration from. Default set to "ambientmetadata:application".

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ApplicationMetadataServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for application metadata.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ApplicationMetadataServiceCollectionExtensions.AddApplicationMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationSection)
member.summary: Adds an instance of to a dependency injection container.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the instance to.
The configuration section to bind.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ApplicationMetadataServiceCollectionExtensions.AddApplicationMetadata(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.AmbientMetadata.ApplicationMetadata})
member.summary: Adds an instance of to a dependency injection container.
member.param: The dependency injection container to add the instance to.
The delegate to configure with.
